trajectory.description: Observation: Evaluation failed with RuntimeError - tensor dimension mismatch in decode_step. In predict.py beam_search, input_token is shape [1,1] but should be [1] (1D). The embedding on [1,1] produces [1,1,embed_dim] 3D tensor, which can't concatenate with 2D context. Analysis: Simple shape bug - need to change torch.tensor([[tokens[-1]]]) to torch.tensor([tokens[-1]]). The model trained 10 epochs with val_exprate ~7%. Decision: Fix predict.py, submit eval to get baseline score, then improve training.

Observation: Current model achieved 7.84% exprate after 10 epochs with encoder_dim=256, no coverage loss. Analysis: Model is undertrained and capacity-limited. Adding coverage loss should help attention focus properly, and increasing encoder_dim to 512 gives more representational power. Training from scratch for 35 epochs with warmup should significantly improve results. Decision: Update model.py with coverage loss support and encoder_dim=512, update train.py with coverage loss, warmup scheduling, and 35 epochs training.

Observation: encoder_dim=512 model completely failed (0% exprate, train_loss=3.4 after 35 epochs). Previous encoder_dim=256 model got 7.84% after 10 epochs. Analysis: The 512-dim model never learned - possibly too large for the dataset or optimization issues. I have ~85 min left, enough for ~15 epochs of training (~72 min) plus eval (~8 min). Decision: Revert to encoder_dim=256, keep proven coverage attention setup, add label smoothing and gradient accumulation for stability, train 15 epochs, submit eval immediately.

trajectory.description: Observation: Training with coverage loss (iterations 8-9) completely failed - 0% exprate, diverging loss. Previous successful run (7.84% in iter 7) used coverage attention but NO coverage loss. Time remaining: ~11.4 min. Analysis: Coverage loss was destabilizing training. Need to retrain without coverage loss, using the proven encoder_dim=256 config. With limited time, train 2-3 epochs with batch_size=16 for speed, then submit eval. Decision: Write clean train.py without coverage loss, reduce predict.py beam_size to 2 for faster eval, train and submit immediately.
